element.description: Individual riser/tread count not enumerated on this sheet's plan view; section shows riser heights broken down as approx. 0.30 total with 0.15/0.15 sub-splits near the base, connecting จอดรถ level +0.20 up to พักผ่อน/เฉลียง levels +0.50/+0.60.

warnings: This sheet A-11 combines a plan view (แปลนบันได ST.1) and a section view (รูปตัดบันได ST.1) of the same short stair connecting the carport (+0.20) to the living/porch area (+0.50/+0.60) — kept as one file since both views describe the single stair element ST.1.
Exact individual step count/riser heights are small and not confidently countable at this resolution; flagged for zoom review.
ST.1 location referenced against the main building grid is approximate (grid_ref is a best-effort free-text position, not a precise grid intersection).
